findings_before_pr4: No GitHub Pages workflow existed on the benchmark branch.
No gh-pages ref was found through direct file lookup.
No root index.html or committed monocle-man-site/dist/index.html existed on the benchmark branch.
The only checked-in deployment configuration found before PR #4 was monocle-man-site/netlify.toml.
changes_landed_in_pr4: Set Vite base to ./ so built static assets are portable on GitHub Pages.
Documented GitHub Pages as the current GitHub-first delivery path and Netlify as historical compatibility config.
Added tests/monocle-man-animation.spec.ts to prove decorative animation runs under no-preference motion settings.

pages_pr_build_run.notes: PR run proved checkout, Node setup, dependency install, and Vite React build. Configure/upload/deploy steps were intentionally skipped on pull_request.

benchmark_pr_run.notes: Benchmark run passed after adding the normal-motion animation test.

remaining_gap: Post-merge GitHub Pages deployment and live URL visual inspection are not yet proven. The available fetch_commit_workflow_runs helper exposes pull_request-triggered runs and returned no push-triggered run for merge commit aa30c43cbbb61d40ae7b22625e8dee24bb35c511. GitHub Pages settings/deployment endpoints are not exposed in the current connector tool list.
required_next_diagnostic: Inspect GitHub Actions for push run(s) on preview-monocle-man-netlify after merge commit aa30c43cbbb61d40ae7b22625e8dee24bb35c511, confirm the deploy-pages job output page_url, then visually inspect that live URL at desktop and mobile sizes.
